name: coart-canvas
description: A clean-room Codex native infinite-canvas widget for AI image, HTML, slides, and annotation workflows.

scripts.check: node --check mcp/server.mjs && node --check mcp/lib/storage.mjs && node --check mcp/lib/safety.mjs && node --check mcp/lib/widget.mjs && node --check scripts/start-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/start-http.mjs && node --check scripts/probe-http.mjs && node --check scripts/probe-widget-loader.mjs
scripts.quality: npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run probe:mcp && npm run probe:http && npm run probe:widget
